---
output:
  xaringan::moon_reader:
    css: ["default", "extra.css"]
    lib_dir: libs
    seal: false
    nature:
      highlightStyle: github
      highlightLines: true
      countIncrementalSlides: false
      ratio: '16:9'
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
##xaringan::inf_mr()
## For offline work: https://bookdown.org/yihui/rmarkdown/some-tips.html#working-offline
## Images not appearing? Put images folder inside the libs folder as that is the main data directory

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(stargazer)
##library(kableExtra)
##library(modelr)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE,
                      eval = TRUE,
                      error = FALSE,
                      message = FALSE,
                      warning = FALSE,
                      comment = NA)
```

background-image: url('libs/Images/00-Pizza_and_Politics_Poster-Mar24.png')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center




---

class: slideblue

.size80[**Today's Agenda**]

<br>

.size65[
Explore the Failure Cases
]

<br>

<br>

<br>

.center[.size40[
  Justin Leinaweaver (Spring 2022)
]]

???

## Prep for Class
1. Review submissions of failure cases
    - https://docs.google.com/document/d/1j6jyM2L5k0eeK02ajr7-IGPVBySXP2Nifl5fTNbGj2E/edit?usp=sharing

<br>

### Current events check-in!



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-blue_triangles2.png')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center
class: middle

.size70[**Paper 2**]

<br>

.size55[.center[Should the US use force (military or economic) to compel other states to behave in line with our interests?]]

???

### Questions on the prompt?



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-blue_triangles2.png')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center
class: middle

.size60[**For Today**]

<br>

.size45[
Find us a .textblue[**specific**], real world case of the US using force (military or economic) to change the behavior of another state but .textblue[**failing**] to achieve its aims.

Submit the .textblue[**APA citation**] before class (no overlap!).
]

???

### Has everyone submitted their citation to the shared Google Doc?

Ok, take a few minutes and review all of the sources.

### Are all of these formatted correctly?



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-blue_triangles2.png')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center
class: middle

.size60[**Let's Explore your Cases!**]

.size45[
1. What state did the US target?

2. Why were they targeted?

3. What specifically did the US do to that state?

4. Why do you believe this was a failure?
]

???

Let's hear your evidence in support of an interventionist America!

Everybody take a couple minutes and get ready to present your case as an answer to these four questions.

<br>

Ok, let's hear your cases!



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-blue_triangles2.png')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center
class: middle

.size70[**Paper 2**]

<br>

.size55[.center[Should the US use force (military or economic) to compel other states to behave in line with our interests?]]

???

*Form groups of 3*

In small groups you now have X minutes to brainstorm an argument that answers this question in the negative.

I want to hear your strongest premises against an interventionist America!

*Share and Discuss*



---

class: slideblue

.pull-left[

<br>
<br>
<br>

.size70[.center[**For Friday**]]

<br>
<br>

.size70[.center[**Draft an Outline**]]

]

.pull-right[

.size35[**Intro**]
.size30[
+ What is the question?
+ Why do we care?
+ Thesis statement
]

.size35[**Reason 1 (premise)**]
.size30[
+ Evidence x 2
]

.size35[**Reason 2 (premise)**]
.size30[
+ Evidence x 2
]

.size35[**Reason 3 (premise)**]
.size30[
+ Evidence x 2
]]


???

Your task for Friday is to build an outline of your argument with all of these elements INCLUDING two pieces of evidence for each premise

### Questions on the assignment?
